privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how OH Finance handles and protects user data.
privacy.informationBody: We collect the account and business information required to operate the service, including names, contact details, usage records and data entered by authorized users.
privacy.useBody: We use information to provide the service, secure accounts, improve performance and deliver support. We do not use it for unrelated purposes without a lawful basis.
privacy.protectionBody: We apply technical and organizational safeguards against unauthorized access, alteration or disclosure, and isolate each store's data according to user permissions.
privacy.rightsBody: Users may request access, correction or deletion of their data where permitted by law and may contact us with any privacy-related question.

sitePolicy.title: Site Use Policy
sitePolicy.intro: This policy governs use of the OH Finance website, system and available services.
sitePolicy.useBody: The system must be used only for lawful business purposes. Misuse, attempts to bypass permissions or actions that affect service stability are prohibited.
sitePolicy.accountsBody: Users are responsible for protecting their credentials and for the accuracy of submitted information. Suspected unauthorized use must be reported immediately.
sitePolicy.availabilityBody: We work to keep the service available and secure. Necessary maintenance or updates may occur while we minimize disruption wherever possible.
sitePolicy.liabilityBody: Reports and results depend on the accuracy of submitted data. Financial transactions should be reviewed before approval or final decisions are made.
